message:
Create a simple Python calculator package with the following files:
1. calc/__init__.py - package init that exports Calculator class
2. calc/calculator.py - Calculator class with add, subtract, multiply, divide methods
3. calc/test_calculator.py - unit tests using pytest for all 4 operations
4. calc/README.md - brief documentation explaining how to use the calculator
5. calc/setup.py - basic setuptools configuration

Create all 5 files. Use the task_tracker tool to track your progress.
